About G&J Construction

12+ years serving Arlington and surrounding areas

G&J Construction started with a simple goal: to provide reliable, long-lasting paving solutions to the people of Arlington and the surrounding areas. Founded by two brothers with a passion for quality craftsmanship, we’ve grown from a small family operation to a trusted name in the DFW paving industry.

Our approach is straightforward: we use the best materials, employ skilled professionals, and maintain open communication with our clients throughout every project. We believe in doing the job right the first time, ensuring your satisfaction and the longevity of our work.

We're deeply rooted in the Arlington community. We understand the unique challenges our Texas climate presents, from scorching summers to occasional ice storms, and we build our pavements to withstand it all. We're committed to contributing to the growth and beauty of our neighborhoods.

12+ Years in Business
800+ Projects Completed
97% Client Satisfaction
20+ Team Members
G&J Construction

Trusted paving contractor professionals serving Arlington, TX and the surrounding areas. Quality work, honest pricing, guaranteed satisfaction.
